item.title: We Lost Seven Men in 15 Seconds
item.description: A veteran recounts a harrowing moment in combat where seven men were lost in just 15 seconds. A powerful firsthand story of sacrifice and the horrors of war.

media:content.media:title: We Lost Seven Men in 15 Seconds
media:content.media:description: A veteran recounts a harrowing moment in combat where seven men were lost in just 15 seconds. A powerful firsthand story of sacrifice and the horrors of war.

item.title: Actor’s Embarrassing Moment with Marcus Luttrell
item.description: An actor shares a humorous and awkward experience meeting Navy SEAL Marcus Luttrell. A lighthearted story from a memorable encounter with the war hero.

media:content.media:title: Actor’s Embarrassing Moment with Marcus Luttrell
media:content.media:description: An actor shares a humorous and awkward experience meeting Navy SEAL Marcus Luttrell. A lighthearted story from a memorable encounter with the war hero.

item.title: Taking Out an Enemy MG Nest with an M79
item.description: A firsthand account of using an M79 grenade launcher to destroy an enemy machine gun nest. See the strategy, tension, and impact in combat.

media:content.media:title: Taking Out an Enemy MG Nest with an M79
media:content.media:description: A firsthand account of using an M79 grenade launcher to destroy an enemy machine gun nest. See the strategy, tension, and impact in combat.

item.title: WWII Veteran Chuck Tatum on Iwo Jima
item.description: WWII veteran Chuck Tatum recounts his experiences landing on Iwo Jima and fighting alongside Medal of Honor recipient John Basilone. A firsthand look at history.

media:content.media:title: WWII Veteran Chuck Tatum on Iwo Jima
media:content.media:description: WWII veteran Chuck Tatum recounts his experiences landing on Iwo Jima and fighting alongside Medal of Honor recipient John Basilone. A firsthand look at history.

item.title: When the Bombs Fell, This Team Stepped Up
item.description: A heroic team rises to action during a bombing. Witness bravery, quick thinking, and teamwork in the face of extreme danger.

media:content.media:title: When the Bombs Fell, This Team Stepped Up
media:content.media:description: A heroic team rises to action during a bombing. Witness bravery, quick thinking, and teamwork in the face of extreme danger.

item.title: Seeing German Tanks During Landing
item.description: A soldier recounts landing under fire and spotting German tanks below. A firsthand WWII experience highlighting the intensity and danger of the battlefield.

media:content.media:title: Seeing German Tanks During Landing
media:content.media:description: A soldier recounts landing under fire and spotting German tanks below. A firsthand WWII experience highlighting the intensity and danger of the battlefield.

item.title: Guardians of the Skies: Vietnam Air Combat
item.description: Explore the heroic aerial missions over Vietnam. Pilots share their experiences, challenges, and triumphs in intense air combat during the war.

media:content.media:title: Guardians of the Skies: Vietnam Air Combat
media:content.media:description: Explore the heroic aerial missions over Vietnam. Pilots share their experiences, challenges, and triumphs in intense air combat during the war.

item.title: WWII Veteran Don Graves on Iwo Jima
item.description: WWII veteran Don Graves recounts Iwo Jima, where only 8 of his 300-man company survived. A powerful firsthand story of courage and sacrifice.

media:content.media:title: WWII Veteran Don Graves on Iwo Jima
media:content.media:description: WWII veteran Don Graves recounts Iwo Jima, where only 8 of his 300-man company survived. A powerful firsthand story of courage and sacrifice.

item.title: Bullet Went Through Both My Legs
item.description: A soldier shares the shocking moment he realized a bullet passed through both legs. A firsthand account of survival, pain, and resilience in combat.

media:content.media:title: Bullet Went Through Both My Legs
media:content.media:description: A soldier shares the shocking moment he realized a bullet passed through both legs. A firsthand account of survival, pain, and resilience in combat.

item.title: Melvin Pender Jr.: Soldier and Olympic Gold Medalist
item.description: Melvin Pender Jr., a U.S. Army veteran, overcame hardship, served in Vietnam, and won Olympic gold in the 4×100m relay at the 1968 Mexico City Games.

media:content.media:title: Melvin Pender Jr.: Soldier and Olympic Gold Medalist
media:content.media:description: Melvin Pender Jr., a U.S. Army veteran, overcame hardship, served in Vietnam, and won Olympic gold in the 4×100m relay at the 1968 Mexico City Games.

item.title: I Didn't Earn My Medal of Honor
item.description: A veteran reflects on their Medal of Honor, sharing why they feel they didn’t earn it and offering a heartfelt perspective on courage and service.

media:content.media:title: I Didn't Earn My Medal of Honor
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on their Medal of Honor, sharing why they feel they didn’t earn it and offering a heartfelt perspective on courage and service.
